properties.property: {"id":2,"name":"Gym Guy","x":7,"y":12,"pages":[{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":1,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":false,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"NPC 15","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":2,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":0,"list":[{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\bThis is an example of a Pok\u00E9mon Gym."]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\bThe only differences are that the trainers become "]},{"c":401,"i":0,"p":["inactive when the Leader is defeated, and the "]},{"c":401,"i":0,"p":["Leader gives you a Gym Badge and TM as a reward."]},{"c":0,"i":0,"p":[]}]}]}

{"id":3,"name":"Brock","x":6,"y":5,"pages":[{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":1,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":false,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"trainer_LEADER_Brock","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":2,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":0,"list":[{"c":355,"i":0,"p":["$stats.gym_leader_attempts[0] \u002B= 1"]},{"c":355,"i":0,"p":["pbTrainerIntro(:LEADER_Brock)"]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\bYou\u0027ve made it this far, but can you beat me?"]},{"c":111,"i":0,"p":[12,"TrainerBattle.start(:LEADER_Brock, \u0022Brock\u0022)"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\me[Badge get]\\bYou\u0027ve earned the Boulder Badge."]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["\\wtnp[110]"]},{"c":355,"i":1,"p":["$stats.set_time_to_badge(0)"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":["$player.badges[0] = true"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bHere, have this TM too."]},{"c":355,"i":1,"p":["pbReceiveItem(:TM80)"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bYou may find the Pok\u00E9mon on Route 1 are a little "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["tougher now."]},{"c":355,"i":1,"p":["$PokemonGlobal.encounter_version = 1"]},{"c":121,"i":1,"p":[4,4,0]},{"c":123,"i":1,"p":["A",0]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":412,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":355,"i":0,"p":["pbTrainerEnd"]},{"c":0,"i":0,"p":[]}]},{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":1,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":true,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"trainer_LEADER_Brock","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":2,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":0,"list":[{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\bI often work in the caves on Route 7, digging up "]},{"c":401,"i":0,"p":["fossils."]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\bThere\u0027s a man in the Pok\u00E9mon Institute who can "]},{"c":401,"i":0,"p":["revive fossils into living Pok\u00E9mon."]},{"c":0,"i":0,"p":[]}]}]}
